allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command ruby -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command bundle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")
Bash(bundle exec rails db:create db:migrate db:seed)
Bash(bundle exec rails runner "puts Article.count; Article.order\(:id\).each { |a| puts ""#{a.id}: #{a.title}"" }")
Bash(bundle exec rails generate migration AddDefaultAndIndexesToArticles)

Bash(git add .gitignore Gemfile Gemfile.lock README.md app/assets/stylesheets/application.css app/controllers/articles_controller.rb app/views/articles/index.html.erb app/views/articles/show.html.erb app/views/layouts/application.html.erb config/routes.rb db/schema.rb db/seeds.rb public/icon.svg test/controllers/articles_controller_test.rb test/system/articles_test.rb db/migrate/20260308131221_add_default_and_indexes_to_articles.rb docs/ trash/)

Bash(git add -u app/assets/stylesheets/application.css.old app/assets/stylesheets/application.tailwind.css app/views/layouts/mailer.html.erb app/views/layouts/mailer.text.erb app/views/pwa/manifest.json.erb app/views/pwa/service-worker.js)
Bash(bundle exec rails runner "g = Gist.new\(title: ''Test'', code: ''puts 2 + 2'', language: ''ruby''\); result = GistExecutionService.new\(g\).call; puts result.inspect")
Bash(bundle exec rails runner "g = Gist.new\(title: ''Bad'', code: ''system\(""echo hack""\)'', language: ''ruby''\); result = GistExecutionService.new\(g\).call; puts result.inspect")
